line = weekly median of successful runs · dashed line = 30 min

WorkflowLatest week (min)8 weeks ago Change

Duration is run start to completion of the last job; first attempts only; wheel builds not tracked. Data is refreshed daily by the ci-timing-tracker workflow. See also the flaky test dashboard.
